headline: Solvac (ENXTBR:SOLV) Valuation Check After Full Year Results Show Higher Net Income On Lower Revenue
summary: Assessing Solvac after its latest earnings announcement Solvac (ENXTBR:SOLV) recently reported full year 2025 results, with revenue of €0.003769 million compared with €0.004971 million a year earlier, while net income was €125.31 million compared with €104.7 million. See our latest analysis for Solvac. The earnings release appears to have coincided with a short term pickup in sentiment, with a 1 month share price return of 10.61% and 7 day gain of 6.73%. However, the 1 year total shareholder...
